reasoning: The Lean statement universally quantifies over any group G and any elements a, b : G, matching the informal "two elements a, b of a group." With `open Subgroup`, `closure {a, b}` is `Subgroup.closure {a, b}`, the subgroup generated by {a, b}, and the right-hand side is `Subgroup.closure {b*a*b^2, b*a*b^3}`. The asserted equality of these two subgroups is exactly "generate the same subgroup." The types (elements of an arbitrary group, Set G as generators) and the conclusion match without adding or dropping hypotheses. No implicit premise drift occurs.
